title: Extra Space Storage raises dividend by 20%, to lift the dividend yield above its REIT peer group
text: Shares of Extra Space Storage Inc. EXR, -1.05% rose 0.4% in premarket trading after the real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates self-storage properties raised its dividend by 20% to boost its implied yield above its peer group. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.50 a share, up from $1.25 a share, with the new dividend payable March 31 to shareholders of record on March 15.
